title: Language change - Case Update Needed popup is not present after Language Change
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup incorrectly appears on Home Screen after language change in Device Settings, instead of only after a firmware DFU update
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → Device Settings → [Device Name].
3. Tap on Languages and change the language to a different option.
6. Observe whether the "Case Update Needed" popup/card is displayed.
expected: The "Case Update Needed" popup should NOT be displayed on the Home screen after a language change. This card should only appear after a firmware DFU update for the earbuds (Settings > Software Update).
